task_completion.description: Verify the alert profile is named 'Critical_Log_Gap_Alert'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an input field labeled 'Profile Name' or a saved profile list showing the exact name 'Critical_Log_Gap_Alert'.

task_completion.description: Verify the local host is selected for monitoring.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the device selection or host field showing '127.0.0.1', 'localhost', or 'ubuntu-server' as the selected device for the alert.

task_completion.description: Verify the alert is set to trigger when no logs are received.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a selected radio button, dropdown, or checkbox indicating 'Notify when no logs are received', 'Log Gap', or 'Silent Log Source'.

task_completion.description: Verify the time interval for the no-log trigger is set to 15 minutes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a time input field or dropdown showing '15' and 'minutes' associated with the trigger condition.

task_completion.description: Verify an email notification is set up to send to 'soc_team@example.com' with the subject 'Log Source Failure'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the email configuration section showing the 'To' address as 'soc_team@example.com' and the 'Subject' as 'Log Source Failure'.

task_completion.description: Verify the alert profile is saved and enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success message, the alert listed in the active alerts table with an 'Enabled' status (often a green checkmark or toggle), or the final save confirmation screen.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser displaying the EventLog Analyzer UI, not terminal commands, API scripts, or database queries.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually interacted with the application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs should be entered into the actual application fields (text boxes, dropdowns, checkboxes) within the EventLog Analyzer interface, not a text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent didn't just edit the HTML of the page to display the expected values.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a natural progression through the UI (e.g., intermediate steps of filling out the form, clicking save) rather than a sudden appearance of the final state without prior interaction.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The alert profile must be named 'Critical_Log_Gap_Alert'. The target host must be the local host ('127.0.0.1', 'localhost', or 'ubuntu-server'). The alert must trigger when no logs are received for exactly 15 minutes. The notification email must be sent to 'soc_team@example.com' with the subject 'Log Source Failure'.
